tasks.label: package-plugin
tasks.command: python -c "import os, zipfile, pathlib; repo = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\Pappi\Documents\GitHub\cured-diagnostics'); out = pathlib.Path(r'C:\Users\Pappi\Documents\GitHub\chdfinal.zip'); if out.exists(): out.unlink(); root = repo.name; with zipfile.ZipFile(out, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf: for file in repo.rglob('*'): if file.is_file() and '.git' not in file.parts and file.suffix.lower() != '.zip': arc = pathlib.PurePosixPath(root, file.relative_to(repo)) ; zf.write(file, arc.as_posix()); print(f'Created {out}'); print(f'Files added: {sum(1 for _ in repo.rglob("*") if _.is_file() and ".git" not in _.parts and _.suffix.lower() != ".zip")}")
